text:
7 = Hispanic, all races 
8 = Other, non-Hispanic or Hispanic not reported 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is constructed in the TAF if either the RACE or ETHNICITY-CODE source variables has a 
valid value, a non-missing code will be assigned. 

If the TAF variable (ETHNCTY_CD) indicates beneficiary is Hispanic, value is set to 7 regardless of what 
is reported in the RACE data element. Otherwise, if there is at least one valid race code, value is set
